---
title: "Nanopub 101"
format: revealjs
---

## What is Nanopub

Nanopub ...

## Register your account

If you have don't have an account yet, please register at [nanodash](https://nanodash.knowledgepixels.com) using your ORCID iD.

![Registration page](images/register.png)

## What is ORCID iD?

## Intro to user

## Approval of user

## Use a template

- Participation in an event template
- For Open Science Retreat 2026

## Ammendment
